programmes.show_description: (2022) Biographical drama. Mark Wahlberg stars as Stuart Long, a sweary amateur boxer who develops a degenerative muscular disorder and reboots his life as a Catholic priest.
Teleshopping.

(2021) Animated comedy with Zach Galifianakis, Olivia Colman and Rob Delaney. Barney just wants a smart robot friend like everyone else at school. But will a faulty unit do the trick?
(1997) Animated drama. When the Russian royal family is murdered, the sole surviving child is separated from her grandmother. Years later, conmen try to exploit the reward for her return.
(1960) Adventure with Richard Greene, Peter Cushing and a young Oliver Reed. Can Robin Hood foil the villainous Sheriff of Nottingham's evil plan to murder the Archbishop of Canterbury?
...Interview Special: Stars Chris Hemsworth and Tessa Thompson, director F Gary Gray and producers Walter Parkes and Laurie Macdonald talk about bringing the series back for a fourth part.
(1973) Can Sinbad stop a master magician from reaching the Fountain of Destiny on the lost land of Lemuria and being crowned the new leader of Marabia?
...Interview Special: Stars Chris Hemsworth and Tessa Thompson, director F Gary Gray and producers Walter Parkes and Laurie Macdonald talk about bringing the series back for a fourth part.
(2003) Family comedy. Steve Martin and Bonnie Hunt star as parents to 12 children. Things go well until their careers take off, when their chaotic lives start to spiral out of control.
(2022) Sea-shanty-singing comedy sequel with James Purefoy. The band are on tour but it's not all plain sailing. The label want Jim to replace his dead dad and Leadville just ain't woke.
(1990) Eric Idle and Robbie Coltrane star as small-time crooks who accidentally steal £1m and are forced to hide in a convent to escape both the police and the mob.
(2021) Found-footage supernatural horror. A young woman visits an Amish community to make a documentary about her family. But there's a good reason why her mum got her away from there...

programmes.show_name: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programmes.show_description: (1961) Sci-fi adventure starring Walter Pidgeon. Earth faces a fiery death when a meteor shower triggers a natural disaster. Can the commander of a nuclear submarine save us all?
Stars Will Smith and Josh Brolin and director Barry Sonnenfeld talk about making the third sci-fi comedy adventure in the Men in Black series.
(1989) Comedy-thriller starring Tom Hanks. A cop investigates a murder to which there's just one witness: Hooch, a slobbering, beer-drinking French mastiff, who now needs 24/7 protection.
(1968) Carol Reed's evergreen musical based on Charles Dickens' Oliver Twist, with Mark Lester starring as the young orphan in Victorian London. With Ron Moody and Oliver Reed.
...Interview Special: Stars Chris Hemsworth and Tessa Thompson, director F Gary Gray and producers Walter Parkes and Laurie Macdonald talk about bringing the series back for a fourth part.
(2016) Taraji P. Henson, Octavia Spencer and Janelle Monáe star in the Oscar-nominated, fact-based drama about three women whose genius made a significant contribution to the space race.
(2023) Sci-fi action adventure starring Adam Driver as a spaceman who crash-lands on a strange planet where giant lizards stalk the darkness... 65 million years ago.
(2018) Unrestrained reboot of the franchise defined by a ruthless extraterrestrial killer whose name says it all... and it's had a DNA upgrade. All the better to kill you with, my dear.
